inputs.label: Design Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the embroidery design in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the embroidery design in centimeters.

inputs.label: Design Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the embroidery design in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the embroidery design in centimeters.

inputs.label: Stitch Density
inputs.businessContext: Average number of stitches per square centimeter for the design.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of stitches per square centimeter for the design.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım için santimetrekare başına ortalama dikiş sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl Stiche pro Quadratzentimeter für das Design.

inputs.label: Thread Consumption Factor
inputs.businessContext: Meters of thread consumed per 1000 stitches, based on stitch type and thread weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Meters of thread consumed per 1000 stitches, based on stitch type and thread weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dikiş tipi ve iplik ağırlığına bağlı olarak 1000 dikiş başına tüketilen metre cinsinden iplik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Meter Garnverbrauch pro 1000 Stiche, basierend auf Stichtyp und Garnstärke.

inputs.label: Thread Cost per Meter
inputs.businessContext: Cost of thread per meter in your local currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of thread per meter in your local currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel para biriminizde metre başına iplik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten des Garns pro Meter in Ihrer Landeswährung.

inputs.label: Machine Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Average machine speed in stitches per minute, including downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average machine speed in stitches per minute, including downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duruşlar dahil makinenin dakikadaki ortalama dikiş hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Maschinengeschwindigkeit in Stichen pro Minute, inklusive Ausfallzeiten.

inputs.label: Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly labor cost for the machine operator.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly labor cost for the machine operator.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makine operatörü için saatlik işçilik maliyeti.
